chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1194 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 07.09.2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would file application for redressal of his grievance before the proper forum. In the above terms, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
